revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: robot Adding: [[zh:十一月初三]], [[zh-yue:十一月初三]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月3日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつみっか）は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[推古天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[592年]][[12月12日]]） - [[蘇我馬子]]が東漢直駒に[[崇峻天皇]]を暗殺させる
== 誕生日 == * [[大永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1521年]][[12月1日]]） - [[武田信玄]]、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1573年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537年]][[12月5日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1597年]]） * [[天保]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1841年]][[12月15日]]） - [[田中正造]]、[[衆議院議員]]・社会運動家（+ [[1913年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[12月22日]]） - [[高峰譲吉]]、[[薬学]]者（+ [[1922年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[推古天皇]]元年（ユリウス暦[[592年]][[12月12日]]） - [[崇峻天皇]]、32代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|2|11|4|10|3|12|11|1103}}
[[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]]

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月3日'''（きゅうれきじゅういちがつみっか）は、[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の3日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[推古天皇]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[592年]][[12月12日]]） - [[蘇我馬子]]が[[東漢駒]]に[[崇峻天皇]]を暗殺させる
== 誕生日 == * [[大永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1521年]][[12月1日]]） - [[武田信玄]]、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1573年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537年]][[12月5日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1597年]]） * [[寛永]]16年([[閏]])（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1639年]][[12月27日]]） - [[渋川春海]]、[[天文方]]（+ [[1715年]]） * [[天保]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1836年]][[12月10日]]） - [[村田新八]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1877年]]） * [[天保]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1841年]][[12月15日]]） - [[田中正造]]、[[衆議院議員]]・社会運動家（+ [[1913年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[12月22日]]） - [[高峰譲吉]]、[[薬学]]者（+ [[1922年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[推古天皇]]元年（ユリウス暦[[592年]][[12月12日]]） - [[崇峻天皇]]、32代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|2|11|4|10|3|12|11|1103}}

== 誕生日 == * [[大永]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1521年]][[12月1日]]） - [[武田信玄]]、[[戦国大名]]（+ [[1573年]]） * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]6年（ユリウス暦[[1537年]][[12月5日]]） - [[足利義昭]]、[[室町幕府]]15代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（+ [[1597年]]） * [[寛永]]16年([[閏]])（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1639年]][[12月27日]]） - [[渋川春海]]、[[天文方]]（+ [[1715年]]） * [[天保]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1836年]][[12月10日]]） - [[村田新八]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1877年]]） * [[天保]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1841年]][[12月15日]]） - [[田中正造]]、[[衆議院議員]]・社会運動家（+ [[1913年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1854年]][[12月22日]]） - [[高峰譲吉]]、[[薬学]]者（+ [[1922年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[推古天皇]]元年（ユリウス暦[[592年]][[12月12日]]） - [[崇峻天皇]]、32代[[天皇]]
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

[[sn:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}元年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} caused the assassination of Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}}元年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|武田信玄}}, a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}}). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}6年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}}, the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}16年 ([[閏]]) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}7年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}}, a politician from Satsuma († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}}, a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}元年 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}}, a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}元年 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}}, the 32nd emperor.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|2|11|4|10|3|12|11|1103}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}}, the 32nd emperor.

[[sn:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|武田信玄}}, a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}}). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}}, the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}}) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}}, a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}}, a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}}, a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}}, the 32nd emperor.

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|武田信玄}}, a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}}). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}}6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}}, the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}}16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}}) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}}, a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}}) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}}, a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}}) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}}, a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|推古天皇}}1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}}, the 32nd emperor.

[[sn:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|武田信玄}} , a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}} ) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}} , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}} , a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} , the 32nd emperor.

[[sn:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|武田信玄}} , a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}} ) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}} , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}} , a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} , the 32nd emperor.

revision.text:
[[sn:November 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|武田信玄}} , a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|足利義昭}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}} ) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}} , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}} , a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} , the 32nd emperor.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|2|11|4|10|3|12|11|1103}}

[[sn:November 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|Takeda Shingen}} , a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}} ) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}} , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}} , a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} , the 32nd emperor.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|2|11|4|10|3|12|11|1103}}

[[sn:November 3 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 3일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] [[zh:十一月初三]] [[en:draft:November 3 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|Takeda Shingen}} , a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}} ) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}} , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}} , a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} , the 32nd emperor.

revision.text:
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Umako|ja|蘇我馬子}} had Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} assassinated.
== Births == * {{ill|Daiei|ja|大永}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1521|ja|1521}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ) – {{ill|Takeda Shingen|ja|Takeda Shingen}} , a warlord († {{ill|1573|ja|1573}} ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1537|ja|1537}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († {{ill|1597|ja|1597}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 16th year ({{ill|8=ja|9=閏|Intercalation (timekeeping)|lt=Intercalation|kk= (timekeeping)}} ) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1639|ja|1639}} {{ill|December 27|ja|12月27日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , an astronomer († {{ill|1715|ja|1715}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1836|ja|1836}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}} ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († {{ill|1877|ja|1877}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 12th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1841|ja|1841}} {{ill|December 15|ja|12月15日}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Shōzō|ja|田中正造}} , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († {{ill|1913|ja|1913}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1854|ja|1854}} {{ill|December 22|ja|12月22日}} ) – {{ill|Takamine Jōkichi|ja|高峰譲吉}} , a pharmacologist († {{ill|1922|ja|1922}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|592|ja|592}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Sushun Tennō|ja|崇峻天皇}} , the 32nd emperor.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|2|11|4|10|3|12|11|1103}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]]
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月初三]]

year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:592|592]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]] had Emperor [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Sushun Tennō]] assassinated. == Births == * [[:en:Daiei (era)|Daiei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1521|1521]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ) – [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a warlord († [[:en:1573|1573]] ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|qq=|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , an astronomer († [[:en:1715|1715]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murata Shinpachi|qq=|1=Murata [[:en:Daiei (era)|Daiei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1521|1521]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ) – [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a warlord († [[:en:1573|1573]] ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († [[:en:1597|1597]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalation]] ) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murata Shinpachi|1=Murata Shinpachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11523448}} , a Satsuma retainer and Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Suiko calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:592|592]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]] had Emperor [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Sushun Tennō]] assassinated. == Births == * [[:en:Daiei (era)|Daiei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1521|1521]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ) – [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a warlord († [[:en:1573|1573]] ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († [[:en:1597|1597]] ). * <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 3일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初三]][[zh:十一月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 3일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月初三]][[zh:十一月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月初三]][[zh:十一月初三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840011]] Wikidata name: 3rd day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:38, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 3|qq=November 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}} – the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suiko Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q298057}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:592|592]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]] had Emperor [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Sushun Tennō]] assassinated. == Births == * [[:en:Daiei (era)|Daiei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1521|1521]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ) – [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a warlord († [[:en:1573|1573]] ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († [[:en:1597|1597]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalation]] ) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , an astronomer († [[:en:1715|1715]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murata Shinpachi|1=Murata Shinpachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11523448}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1877|1877]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – [[:en:Shōzō Tanaka|Tanaka Shōzō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († [[:en:1913|1913]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – [[:en:Takamine Jōkichi|Takamine Jōkichi]] , a pharmacologist († [[:en:1922|1922]] ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Suiko Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suiko Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q298057}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:592|592]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Sushun Tennō]] , the 32nd emperor.

Tennō|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suiko Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q298057}} 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:592|592]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – [[:en:Soga no Umako|Soga no Umako]] had Emperor [[:en:Emperor Sushun|Sushun Tennō]] assassinated. == Births == * [[:en:Daiei (era)|Daiei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1521|1521]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ) – [[Takeda Shingen]]{{efn|Japanese feudal lord (1521–1573)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Shingen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , a warlord († [[:en:1573|1573]] ). * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (era)|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 6th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1537|1537]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the 15th shōgun of the Muromachi shogunate († [[:en:1597|1597]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 16th year ([[:en:Intercalation (timekeeping)|Intercalation]] ) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1639|1639]] [[:en:December 27|December 27]] ) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , an astronomer († [[:en:1715|1715]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1836|1836]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]] ) – {{ill|Murata Shinpachi|ja|村田新八|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murata Shinpachi|1=Murata Shinpachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11523448}} , a Satsuma retainer and politician († [[:en:1877|1877]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 12th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1841|1841]] [[:en:December 15|December 15]] ) – [[:en:Shōzō Tanaka|Tanaka Shōzō]] , a member of the House of Representatives and social reformer († [[:en:1913|1913]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1854|1854]] [[:en:December 22|December 22]] ) – [[:en:Takamine Jōkichi|Takamine Jōkichi]] , a pharmacologist († [[:en:1922|1922]] ).
